zh.lifeSummary: John de Poole於1420年出生在英國英格蘭米德萊可。他與Elizabeth Poole結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John de Poole于1420年出生在英国英格兰米德萊可。他与Elizabeth Poole结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Poole
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English pol(e), polle, poul(e) ‘pool, pond’ (Old English pōl). The name may be topographic, for someone who lived by a pool, or habitative, from a place so named.
Possibly an Americanized form of German Puhl or Pfuhl(e) (see Pool 4).

variants.name: Pool
meanings: English: variant of   Poole   or   Paul  .
Jewish (from the Netherlands) and Dutch: ethnic name for someone from Poland.

variants.name: Pooler
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): topographic name for someone who lived near a pool, or a habitational name for someone from a place called with this word (see   Poole  ).
Americanized form of French   Poulin   ‘young animal, colt’.
In some cases also an Americanized form of German Pfuhler, a variant of Pfuhl + -er, suffix denoting an inhabitant.

variants.name: Paul
meanings: English, French, German, Dutch, Swedish, West Indian (mainly Haiti, also e.g. Saint Lucia), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania): from the personal name Paul (from Latin Paulus ‘small’), which has always been popular in Christendom. It was the name adopted by the Pharisee Saul of Tarsus after his conversion to Christianity on the road to Damascus in about AD 34. He was a most energetic missionary to the Gentiles in the Roman Empire, and played a very significant role in establishing Christianity as a major world religion. The name was borne also by numerous other early Christian saints. It is also occasionally borne by Jews; the reasons for this are not clear. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages and their patronymics and other derivatives, e.g. Greek Pavlis , Slovenian Pavel and Pavlič (see Pavlic ), Polish Paweł (see Pawel ) and Pawlicki , Assyrian/Chaldean Polous and Polus . In France, this surname is most common in Brittany (see 2 below).
Breton (mainly Finistère): from a Frenchified form of the personal name Paol, Breton form of Paul .
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phóil ‘son of Paul’. Compare McFall .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: John de Poole was born in 1420, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom. He married Elizabeth Poole. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: John de Poole est né en 1420, à Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Elizabeth Poole. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: John de Poole wurde 1420 in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat Elizabeth Poole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: John de Poole è nato il nel 1420 nel Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Elizabeth Poole. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ko.lifeSummary: John de Poole(은)는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 태어났다. 그는 Elizabeth Poole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: John de Poole nasceu em 1420, em Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Poole. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: John de Poole родился в 1420 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Poole. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: John de Poole nació en 1420, en Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Elizabeth Poole. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
